Name: EquipParamGem
Description:
Defines an Ash of War item. Determines what weapons it can be applied to and with what affinities.
Does not manage unique Ashes of War. Ashes of war may not immediately function on arbitrary weapons.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: Menu icon ID

Fields.Name: Rank
Fields.Description: Magic stone rank

Fields.Name: Sort Group ID
Fields.Description: Sort item type ID. In the sort Item type order, the same ID is displayed together as the same group.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID [0]
Fields.Description: Special effect ID00

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID [1]
Fields.Description: Special effect ID01

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID [2]
Fields.Description: Special effect ID02

Fields.Name: Item Get Tutorial Flag ID
Fields.Description: Event flag ID for the tutorial when you first get the item. Flag ON when item is obtained.

Fields.Name: Sword Arts ID
Fields.Description: ID of the destination arts parameter

Fields.Name: Application Cost
Fields.Description: Installation price

Fields.Name: Sell Value

Fields.Description: Selling price

Fields.Name: Sort ID

Fields.Name: Is Discardable
Fields.Description: Can you throw away the item? TRUE = thrown away

Fields.Name: Is Droppable
Fields.Description: Can I put the item on the spot? TRUE = can be placed

Fields.Name: Is Depositable
Fields.Description: Can you leave it in the warehouse?

Fields.Name: Is Drop Disabled in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: Is multi-drop sharing prohibited?

Fields.Name: Item Acquisition Dialog Condition Type
Fields.Description: Whether to display it in the item acquisition dialog when acquiring an item (not entered: new only)

Fields.Name: Item Acquisition Show Condition Type
Fields.Description: Whether to display in the item acquisition log when acquiring the item (not entered: )

Fields.Name: Default Weapon Affinity
Fields.Description: Default weapon attribute ID. Can be installed even with unopened weapon attributes

Fields.Name: Is Special Ash of War
Fields.Description: Determines whether this Ash of War is considered 'special'. Weapons with restrictSpecialSwordArt set to 1 will be unable to slot in these ashes of war.
